businessQuestion: Which return reasons contribute the highest refund amount?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    RETURN_REASON,
    COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_RETURNS,
    SUM(REFUND_AMT) AS REFUND_AMOUNT,
    SUM(HANDLING_COST_AMT) AS HANDLING_COST
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_RETURNS
GROUP BY RETURN_REASON
ORDER BY REFUND_AMOUNT DESC;
businessContext: Customer service teams want to understand why customers return products.
